// common questions

FAQ

Everything you need to know before the big day.

1️⃣ What is NOVASPHERE 2026?▼

NOVASPHERE 2026 is an inter-college innovation summit featuring Ideathon, poster design, tech debate, debugging competition, and two hands-on technical workshops.

2️⃣ Who can participate?▼

Students from any recognized college/university can participate. Individual and team participation depends on the specific event rules.

3️⃣ Is it necessary to bring a working project for the Ideathon?▼

No. The Ideathon focuses on idea pitching. Participants must present their concept using a PPT — no prototype or coding is required and PPT should be made in the venue after the topic is given.

4️⃣ Can I participate in more than one event?▼

Yes! Participants are allowed to register for multiple events, provided there are no schedule clashes.

5️⃣ What is the refund policy?▼

Registrations are non-refundable 7 days before the event. Before that, 80% refund is issued within 5–7 business days.

6️⃣ What is the dress code?▼

Participants are expected to maintain a smart casual or formal dress code throughout the event.

7️⃣ What do I need to bring for the event?▼

Participants should bring: Valid College ID and Laptop (for Debug Domain & Workshops).

8️⃣ Will certificates be provided?▼

Yes. Participation certificates will be provided to all participants, and winners will receive special recognition.

9️⃣ How will participants be judged?▼

Participants will be evaluated by a panel of judges based on Innovation & Creativity, Technical Knowledge, Presentation Skills, and Problem-Solving Ability.

🔟 How do I contact organizers?▼

Email: novasphere.sist@gmail.com | Phone: +91 8610219015 (event day only)

1️⃣1️⃣ What is the team size?▼

Team size depends on the event and is mentioned in each event description.

1️⃣2️⃣ What is the registration fee?▼

Registration fee is ₹150 per person per event.

1️⃣3️⃣ What happens if a participant arrives late?▼

Late entry may not be allowed once briefing or rounds have started.

1️⃣4️⃣ Is coding required in Tech Escape Challenge?▼

No full coding is required; it focuses on logic and puzzle solving.

1️⃣5️⃣ What programming languages are allowed in Debug Dominion?▼

Any language specified by organizers for the provided problem files.
